offers.title: Get up to £85 Amazon gift card from ScottishPower – New and Existing Customer switches
offers.description:
Sign up as a new customer, or if you’re already with ScottishPower, simply switch tariff.

Here’s what you’ll get:

- £42.50 Amazon.co.uk gift card when you purchase a single fuel tariff (either gas or electricity) or;↵ - £85 Amazon.co.uk gift card when you purchase a dual fuel tariff (gas and electricity)

How to get your gift card:

Simply click through and switch and the voucher will be sent to you automatically around 120 days after the go live on supply.↵ To be eligible for this offer, you must click through from Blue Light Card to ScottishPower and complete your transaction following this click through. Otherwise you will not be tracked and will not be able included in fulfilment of the voucher

Why ScottishPower↵ Choose when you switch on Half-Price Electricity at selected times throughout the week with Power Saver*↵ ↵ *Our Power Saver Offer events are part of our Power Saver service. You must be a ScottishPower electricity customer with an online account, a communicating smart meter and consent to sharing half-hourly readings with us to participate in the Power Saver Offer. Exclusions apply. See Power Saver Offer Terms and Conditions.↵ Electricity used will be charged at your normal unit rate, and you will later have your bill, or meter if you are a PAYG customer, credited for the energy used during your chosen slots. Each day is divided into hourly slots, with a 50% or 20% discount rating applied to selected slots (50% slots are available 98 hours per week, 20% slots are available 50 hours per week). Credit is calculated depending on the rating of your chosen slots (excluding VAT) and appears as ‘Power Saver Credit’ on your bill or statement. Your daily standing charge will be charged at your normal rate. Eligibility criteria, exclusions, and T&Cs apply.
offers.keywords: switches new mobile motoring customer amazon get existing from 85 up scottishpower

offers.title: Save 15% all year round
offers.description: Save 15% on a range of all-inclusive activity adventures, especially for kids and families. Choose from:↵ • Kids’ Adventure Camps: available at a whopping 12 dedicated kids-only centres during school holidays, your children can be assured of undivided attention on an all-inclusive Kids’ Adventure Camp. With 24-hour childcare and pastoral provision provided by dedicated Group Leaders plus three hearty meals, accommodation and all activities included in the price, it’s easy to see why PGL has become the market leader in kids’ camps in the UK. Accredited by Oftsed, BAPA and ABTA, you can even pay with childcare vouchers or tax-free childcare to give your kids their best independent holiday yet.↵ ↵ • Kids’ Specialist Adventure Camps: in addition to PGL’s classic Kids’ Adventure Camps, 8–16-year-olds can also enjoy a range of week-long Specialist Adventure Camps, from watersports and pony camps to cooking and baking, theme parks and sports camps, running exclusively over the summer holidays. Grouped by age so it’s easy to make friends, they will be able to experience a half-day of their specialism and a half-day taking part in classic PGL activities spanning land, air AND water!↵ • Family Adventure Breaks: never mind letting the kids have all the fun – now you can join them, at 2 epic family supercentres! PGL’s classic and much-loved all-inclusive multi-activity holidays are ideal for experiencing a range of adventures as a family. From abseiling to raft building, zip wire to archery, climbing to giant swing riding, you’ll have the chance to experience a fun-packed programme from dawn until dusk during the school holidays, with something to suit every family member.↵ • Family Activity Days: only have 24 hours to kill? Pack your day out with a punch during the school holidays and experience an action-filled day out for all the family, with a PGL Family Activity Day at Barton Hall in Devon or Caythorpe Court in Lincolnshire. Families get to experience three exhilarating activities plus a delicious hot lunch, to make sure you’re refuelled ready for an afternoon of adventure. With activities including giant swing, archery, zip wire and high ropes on offer, it’s a great way to get a taste of the PGL magic if you’re thinking about booking a longer break later in the year.↵ • Kids’ Birthday Parties: looking to book a fun, active, outdoor birthday party or other celebration for your child? PGL offers half or full day party packages for up to 12 kids between February and November every year, featuring the most requested and popular activities on offer!

offers.description: This is your sign to do something better with your time. Lane7 is your go-to for bowling, great food, drinks, and unapologetically good times with your mates. It’s not one thing, it’s everything you need for a date night, group hang or last-minute plan that turns into something bigger.↵ ↵ Go head-to-head on boutique bowling lanes, take over the beer pong table, dominate shuffleboard or lose track of time in the arcades. Feeling bold? Grab a private karaoke room and own it. Drop in for a few games in the afternoon or stay late as the music gets louder and the energy ramps up, either way, you’re in the right place.↵ Food and drink bring their own game. Stacked burgers, loaded sharers and street food favourites land alongside a bar pouring craft beers, cocktails and whatever else you’re in the mood for. One round turns into another. One drink turns into a few more.↵ Spontaneous plans, big celebrations or anything in between, Lane7 is where you show up, play hard, eat well and make it a night (or day) worth talking about. It's All Your Best Nights Out In One!
offers.keywords: lane off 7 mobile motoring electronics get you book online 10 when

offers.title: Get 10% off select online bookings
offers.description: Black Country Living Museum is an award-winning open-air museum that tells the story of one of the very first industrialised landscapes in Britain↵ Explore over 250 years of history, from the Industrial Revolution to post-war prosperity, through living interpretation.↵ Leave the 21st century behind for the day and experience sights, sounds, smells, and tastes of the Black Country as you explore over 80 rebuilt and recreated shops, houses and industrial workshops. In addition, you’ll meet our historic characters, who will share what it was really like to live and work during this revolutionary period of history.↵ Get ready for endless adventures! Every day ticket includes an UnChained Annual Pass with 12 months of free return visits. And with something new to see on every visit, you’ll want to come back again and again. For fans of screen tourism, the Museum was used for several filming locations in the global smash-hit drama Peaky Blinders. Explore authentic screen-used sets and immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Charlie's Yard. For Peaky Blinders fans, this is an experience not to be missed.
offers.keywords: living black off bookings mobile motoring select museum get online 10 country

offers.description: Gutterball is where nights out get an upgrade. Bold, loud and built for good times, it’s your go-to for bowling, great food, drinks and everything in between. From early through till late, it’s the perfect spot to drop in for a few games, a bite to eat and a bit of friendly competition with your family, date or mates↵ Take on boutique bowling lanes, beer pong, shuffleboard and arcade games, or step it up with a private karaoke room when you’re ready. It’s easy-going, social and made for groups who want something better than the usual.↵ As the day rolls on, the energy builds. The music gets louder, the lights come down and the vibe shifts into a proper late-night spot made for grown-up nights out that don’t do early finishes.↵ Food and drink run right through it all. Think stacked burgers, loaded sharers and street food favourites, alongside cocktails, craft beers and everything you need for another round.↵ From first frames to last orders, Gutterball is where you show up, get involved and turn a simple plan into a night worth talking about.

offers.description: This is your cue to level up your plans. Level X is where games, food and feel-good energy come together for a day or night out that actually delivers. It’s built for families, mates and anyone up for a bit of fun, with loads to get stuck into from the moment you arrive.↵ Take on interactive experiences like bowling, AR digital darts, shuffleboard and high-energy arcade games, plus racing simulators and competitive challenges that keep everyone involved, we even have full-sized go karting at our Middlesbrough venue. Whether its kids trying something new, parents getting competitive, or a mixed group looking for laughs, there’s something for every age and energy level.↵ Perfect for family days out, birthdays or spontaneous plans, Level X makes it easy to turn a few hours into a full experience. There’s always another game to try, another round to win and another reason to stay a bit longer.↵ Food and drink keep things simple and crowd-pleasing, with options for all ages and a bar for the grown-ups. offers.title: Get 9% off your order
offers.description:
If you have an issue with your account please reach out to our member services team. 

You can receive an exclusive 9% off your KFC order! All you need to do is link your card with the KFC app to create a member-unique QR code. How do you do that? Follow these instructions:↵ 1. Download the KFC app and click on the More menu↵ 2. Click Discounts and sign in or create an account↵ 3. Click Apply Blue Light Card discount and enter your card number and surname↵ 4. Set up complete. Head to KFC rewards and click on the offers tab to access your unique QR code↵ ↵ Key things to know:↵ - Save 9% on your order↵ - Can be redeemed in take out or drive through restaurants↵ - No spend limit↵ - Must present unique code to redeem discount↵ - Cannot be used on in-app purchases

offers.title: £50 gift card when you choose an EDF Simply Fixed or Simply Tracker dual fuel tariff
offers.description:
From 16 February to 6 April 2026, each friend you successfully refer to EDF will receive £75 and you’ll be rewarded with £100.↵ And the best part? There’s no limit to how many friends you can share the offer with… or how much you can earn.↵ Sign up as a new customer or, if you’re already with EDF, simply switch to a fixed tariff. If you choose a dual fuel fixed tariff, you’ll get a £50 gift card.
Rated Excellent on Trustpilot.↵ Here’s what you’ll get:↵ A £50 gift card when you purchase a dual fuel tariff (both gas and electricity)↵ This must be either the simply fixed or simply tracker tariff to be eligible for the gift card.↵ Free electric on Christmas day - see terms here https://www.edfenergy.com/free-elec/december-terms-and-conditions?lightbox=true↵ Choose your gift card from Amazon.co.uk, Merlin Days Out, Aldi, Tesco, ASOS or The Restaurant Group.↵ How to get your gift card:↵ • You’ll only get your gift card if you complete your purchase using the link below.↵ • Simply select ‘I’m not with EDF’ or ‘I’m with EDF’ when directed to EDF’s website to continue as a new or existing customer.↵ • The gift card cannot be claimed if the contract with EDF is cancelled within 3 months of going live.↵ • Please provide the email address you would like the gift card to be sent to when prompted, prior to purchasing your tariff. You will receive an email from the gift card provider when you do this, please note this is not your final gift card.↵ • You’ll pick the gift card you’d like when instructions are sent 120 days after your tariff start date from no-reply@giftcloud.com. EDF will provide your details securely to the third-party gift card supplier (Gift Cloud).↵ • Gift Cloud will then send you instructions on how you claim your gift card within 30 days, and you’ll need to claim it within 90 days.↵ • The Gift Card redemption process can take up to a total of 120 days to arrive after your contract start date, if you have not received the gift card by this time please contact voucherqueries@edfenergy.com.↵ ↵ From 1 October to 31 December 2025 the energy price cap will be £1,755 a year. Our Simply Fixed Sep26 tariff has a typical bill price of £1,598 a year – £157 cheaper than Ofgem's price cap from 1 October. Exit fees apply.↵ Figures are based on Ofgem ‘typical’ consumption. 'Typical' yearly consumption is 2,700kWh electricity and 11,500kWh gas based on a national average of regional prices for a dual fuel customer with a standard electricity meter who pays by Direct Debit. 'Typical' consumption assumes the price cap does not change over a full year. In reality, the price cap changes every three months. Fixed tariff rates remain the same for the duration of the tariff and are not covered by the energy price cap.↵ The energy regulator Ofgem reviews and sets the maximum rates we can charge for gas and electricity on our variable tariffs. This is the energy price cap. The cap is reviewed every three months in January, April, July and October.↵ Please remember – it’s the standing charge and cost per unit of energy that’s a set rate – not your bill which will vary depending on how much energy you use.↵ See EDF's prediction for the price cap. It's updated weekly and can help you decide what's best for you. We use Ofgem's price cap methodology to predict future price cap levels. Our prediction could rise or fall, based mostly on changes in the wholesale cost of energy for future periods.
offers.keywords: motoring choose dual tracker when fashion mobile supermarket you grocery clothes edf fuel simply 50 tariff food fixed

On 5-night cruises - £50 per person on-board spend
On 6 to 10-night cruises - £100 per person on-board spend
On 11 to 15-night cruises - £150 per person on-board spend
On 16 night+ cruises - £200 per person on-board spend
↵ 
Fred. Olsen are excited to announce 70 new itineraries from January 2027! 
Freedom Fare Price Promise*

If you book within the first four weeks of launch, you can take advantage of their Freedom Fare Price Promise. If your cruise price is later reduced, they will automatically upgrade you or gift you On-Board Spend, so you can rest assured that by booking early, you'll be getting the best value on your Freedom Fare. In addition, they have ensured that their single occupancy cabins will be the same as equivalent twin fares in the first four weeks of launch. 



*Terms and conditions apply



New Inclusive Pricing

We’ve listened to our guests and made our pricing simpler, clearer, and more inclusive – ensuring even more is now included within our cruise fares. Alongside full-board dining, entertainment and enrichment talks, guests will enjoy complimentary guided walks ashore, shuttle buses for ports over a mile away from the ship, fitness centre access and classes. Port taxes, fees and gratuities are also included, along with our satisfaction guarantee.

Plus, they're delighted to share that our new 2027 itineraries will include house beer, house wine, & draught soft drinks, served by the glass with lunch and dinner in their ship’s restaurants with their compliments– so that you can unwind and savour every moment, knowing that everything is taken care of.
